meta.method: Match duplicate (name, containingCounty) pairs in geography-registry.json; identify canonical = the GEOID that exists in TIGER 2024 PLACE shapefile.
meta.note: Consumers should resolve phantom geoids via this map before looking up place data. See js/place-chas-lookup.js for an example consumer.

manual_additions.0810270: Cañon City — registry name uses ñ; TIGER places shapefile lists it under canonical GEOID 0811810 (likely an ASCII-normalization mismatch in the registry build script).
manual_additions.0812910: Central City — registry uses long-form 'Central City'; TIGER places lists it under canonical GEOID 0812900 'Central' (Census short form). Same place, different label conventions.
